important_emails.subject: နောက်အော်ဒါမှာ 2000 MMK off နဲ့မှာစားပါ🍜
important_emails.snippet: စားကောင်းတာလေးမှာမလား📞 ပြန်မှာစားသင့်တာလေးတွေ စားချင်တာ ပြန်မှာစားချိန်တန်ပြီ။ Seoul K 7-Levels Korean Spicy Noodle (Kantharyar Center) က အမိုက်စားမီနူးတွေကို ယူ့မှာရှိတဲ့ 2000 MMK တန်ဘောက်ချာလေးနဲ့

important_emails.subject: (Action Required) Cypher is getting Acquired - Important account update
important_emails.snippet: Cypher is being acquired by Nium. Here's what it means for your account, cards, rewards and funds. Cypher × Nium Cypher is getting acquired by NIUM Dear Cypher Users, Today, Cypher is getting
important_emails.body_preview:
Cypher is getting acquired by NIUM

Cypher is being acquired by Nium. Here's what it means for your account, cards, rewards and funds.

Cypher  ×  Nium

**********************************
Cypher is getting acquired by NIUM
**********************************

Dear Cypher Users,

Today, Cypher is getting acquired by Nium, the global leader in cross-border payments infrastructure, to expand its fiat-to-onchain capabilities and build a new Cypher experience powered by Nium's global payme
